name: gas in gallbladder or biliary tract
description: Presence of gas suggesting infection or abnormal communication.

attributes.name: presence
attributes.description: Presence or absence of gas in gallbladder or biliary tract

values.name: absent
values.description: Gas in gallbladder or biliary tract is absent

values.name: present
values.description: Gas in gallbladder or biliary tract is present

values.name: indeterminate
values.description: Presence of gas in gallbladder or biliary tract cannot be determined

values.name: unknown
values.description: Presence of gas in gallbladder or biliary tract is unknown

attributes.name: Presence
attributes.description: Whether pneumobilia is present or absent.

values.name: Present
values.description: The finding is present.

values.name: Absent
values.description: The finding is absent.

values.name: Limited
values.description: Pneumobilia is limited in extent.

values.name: Extensive
values.description: Pneumobilia is extensive.

values.name: Intrahepatic ducts
values.description: Pneumobilia is located in the intrahepatic ducts.

values.name: Common bile duct
values.description: Pneumobilia is located in the common bile duct.

values.name: Both
values.description: Pneumobilia is located in both the intrahepatic ducts and common bile duct.

attributes.name: Associated bile duct dilation
attributes.description: Whether there is associated bile duct dilation.

values.name: Present
values.description: There is associated bile duct dilation.

values.name: Absent
values.description: There is no associated bile duct dilation.

attributes.name: Biliary stent
attributes.description: Whether a biliary stent is present.

values.name: Present
values.description: A biliary stent is present.

values.name: Absent
values.description: A biliary stent is absent.

values.name: Present
values.description: Acute pancreatitis is present.

values.name: Absent
values.description: Acute pancreatitis is absent.

values.name: Present
values.description: Periportal edema is present.

values.name: Absent
values.description: Periportal edema is absent.

attributes.name: Portal vein gas
attributes.description: Whether portal vein gas is present.

values.name: Present
values.description: Portal vein gas is present.

values.name: Absent
values.description: Portal vein gas is absent.

attributes.name: change from prior
attributes.description: Whether and how a gas in gallbladder or biliary tract has changed over time

values.name: unchanged
values.description: Gas in gallbladder or biliary tract is unchanged

values.name: stable
values.description: Gas in gallbladder or biliary tract is stable

values.name: new
values.description: Gas in gallbladder or biliary tract is new

values.name: resolved
values.description: Gas in gallbladder or biliary tract seen on a prior exam has resolved

values.name: increased
values.description: Gas in gallbladder or biliary tract has increased

values.name: decreased
values.description: Gas in gallbladder or biliary tract has decreased

values.name: larger
values.description: Gas in gallbladder or biliary tract is larger

values.name: smaller
